prestazioni: Turbocharger upgrade to Garrett GTX4202R with billet compressor wheel (3.4-inch inducer) for the **Skyactiv-G 3.3L Turbo (PY-VPTS)** inline-6 engine, paired with a custom 4-inch V-band downpipe and a PTP 3.5-inch stainless steel exhaust system with dual 100mm titanium tips to reduce backpressure by 40% while maintaining OEM emissions compliance via a secondary catalytic converter bypass valve (activated via ECU at 4,500 RPM).

Full standalone Motec M150 ECU with custom calibration for the **PY-VPTS** engine, featuring flex-fuel compatibility (E85), individual cylinder fuel trims, and a 2,000 Hz closed-loop lambda control system. Includes a bespoke traction control strategy with 12-stage adjustability and launch control (0-60 mph in 4.2s). Paired with a **Mazda OEM CP3 high-pressure fuel pump** modified by **Radium Engineering** for 1,200cc/min flow at 12V, and **ID1700x injectors** with custom flow-matched data for the **Skyactiv-G** combustion chamber.

Full **KW Suspensions Clubsport 3-way adjustable coilovers** with remote reservoirs, 24-click rebound damping, and 18-click compression damping, specifically valved for the **CX-80’s SKYACTIV-BODY Gen2** platform. Includes **Mazda OEM hollow anti-roll bars** reinforced with **SuperPro polyurethane bushings** (90A durometer) and **Whiteline adjustable end links** for a 30% reduction in body roll. Front strut tower brace upgraded to a **Cusco Type RS** 2.5mm thick aluminum unit with integrated **Mazda MX-5 ND** strut mount reinforcement plates.
estetica: **Rocket Bunny Pandem CX-80 Widebody Kit** (Type 2), featuring 3-piece overfenders with carbon fiber weave (2x2 twill), extended rocker panels with integrated LED side markers, and a custom **Mazda3 Turbo** rear bumper lip with diffuser. Painted in **Mazda Soul Red Crystal Metallic** with **3M Matte Black** overlay on the upper fenders and hood for a two-tone effect. Includes **custom 3D-printed ABS side skirts** with integrated air curtains for brake cooling.

**Seibon Carbon Fiber Hood** (OEM replacement) with a **50mm aggressive scoop** and **hidden carbon weave** under the clear coat, paired with **Mazda CX-5 Turbo** LED headlights (modified with **Lux H8 V4** bulbs and **Morimoto D2S 4.0** projectors). Rear features a **custom carbon fiber spoiler** (200mm chord, 30mm height) with **GReddy RS** center-mounted third brake light and **Anzo USA** smoked taillights with sequential turn signals.

**Work Emotion CR Kiwami** 20x10.5 ET+15 (front) and 20x11.5 ET+20 (rear) wheels, wrapped in **Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R** tires (275/30/20 front, 295/25/20 rear). Wheel spacers upgraded to **H&R TRAK+** 15mm hub-centric units with **Mazda CX-9** stud conversion (M14x1.5). Brake system features **AP Racing Radi-CAL 6-piston front calipers** (380mm rotors) and **4-piston rear calipers** (355mm rotors), with **Ferodo DS2500** pads and **ATE Type 200** brake fluid.
